title: Hyalosepalum oblongifolium
taxonomy: Hyalosepalum oblongifolium belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This classification is due to its orchid-like flowers and growth patterns. As a member of the orchid family, Hyalosepalum oblongifolium is further classified into the subfamily Orchidoideae and the tribe Orchideae. Within the tribe, it is placed in the subtribe Orchidinae. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant.
